phases: Phase 1: reachability_probe + Phase 3 Round 0 wiring + tests

limitations: V1 visibility-only; per-finding reachability probe with five checks (importability, test collection, caller graph, packaging, interface match); WARN-only at recon Phase 3 Round 0; Python-only (multi-language deferred to V2)
non_goals: blocking VETO behavior in /qor-audit (Phase 99 V2 surface); multi-language probe (Rust/TS/JS deferred); auto-rewriting of recon briefs; result caching across runs
exclusions: no changes to qor-audit SKILL.md (Phase 99 surface); no changes to qor-deep-audit SKILL.md; no changes to existing Step 0.6 audit lints; existing Step 4.6.5-4.6.9 substantiate gates unchanged in order
